name: LinkedIn Lead Generation and Outreach Automation
description: An automation tool designed to identify potential leads on LinkedIn using AI and streamline outreach campaigns by managing contact discovery and follow-up processes.

inputs.name: target_market_description
inputs.description: Description of the target market or ideal customer profile for lead generation.

inputs.name: linkedin_credentials
inputs.description: User authentication data required to access LinkedIn for automation purposes.

inputs.name: search_criteria
inputs.description: Parameters and filters to specify how leads should be searched and selected on LinkedIn.

inputs.name: outreach_message_template
inputs.description: Predefined message templates used for automated outreach to discovered leads.

outputs.name: lead_list
outputs.description: A list of identified potential leads with relevant profile information.

outputs.name: automation_report
outputs.description: Summary of the outreach campaign results, including contact attempts and responses.

patterns: AI-driven lead identification based on target market descriptions
Feedback loop from campaign performance to refine lead search
steps: Define the target market and lead criteria.
Authenticate and connect to LinkedIn using user credentials.
Use AI algorithms to find and extract relevant leads from LinkedIn profiles matching criteria.
Compile and organize leads into a manageable list.
Deploy outreach campaigns using customizable message templates.
Generate reports summarizing campaign performance and lead interactions.
use_cases: Sales teams automating lead sourcing and outreach on LinkedIn.
Recruiters identifying and contacting potential candidates efficiently.
Marketing professionals running targeted LinkedIn campaigns.

prompt_templates.name: lead_generation_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Find LinkedIn leads matching this target market: {target_market_description}
